programme.desc: When Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Dr Sienna Brooks, and together they must race across Europe against the clock to foil a deadly global plot.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: An orphaned autistic savant who deciphers a government code in a magazine triggers a national security alarm that makes him an assassin's target.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: man.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: Up In Smoke
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: Marshal Gerard leads the hunt by initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. This film is packed with suspense, action and daring twists.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries

programme.title: When Calls the Heart

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying and renovations, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 1
programme.desc: Do you ever get tired of what you're doing? Today on the program, Joyce discusses why it's so important to do the right thing, with a right attitude that honours God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Man of God
programme.desc: Exiled unjustly, convicted without trial, slandered without cause. Man of God depicts the trials and tribulations of Saint Nektarios of Aegina, as he bears the unjust hatred of his enemies while preaching the Word of God.

programme.title: The Other Side of the River
programme.desc: As a young girl living in the Amazonian jungle, Elba wondered if there wasn't a better life on the other side of the river.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: With war raging and soldiers closing in, wounded missionary Gladys Aylward sets out on the most difficult journey of her life - a 100-mile trek over mountains with 100 orphaned children to find a safe haven.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the New Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Living as Impacters in the Modern World Part 1
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Love & Glamping
programme.desc: City girl Katie is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort. Far from sporty, she faces her fears trying the camp's activities with help from Will, a rugged outdoorsman and nature guide.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: The first big case leaves Gary grasping for clues. He goes on a covert hunt with an old friend at his side.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.sub-title: This is Bigger Than We Know
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt1
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 1
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 1
programme.desc: Do you ever get tired of what you're doing? Today on the program, Joyce discusses why it's so important to do the right thing, with a right attitude that honours God.

programme.title: Love & Glamping
programme.desc: City girl Katie is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort. Far from sporty, she faces her fears trying the camp's activities with help from Will, a rugged outdoorsman and nature guide.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an effort to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: The Mountain Within Me
programme.desc: After suffering a spinal cord injury, professional rugby player Ed Jackson's world changes forever. Following Ed's journey on his recovery as he achieves the heights of Snowdonia, the Alps and Himalayas.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A lost penguin rescued from an oil spill transforms the life of a heartbroken fisherman. They soon become unlikely friends, so bonded that even the vast ocean cannot divide them.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Six unruly kids wreak havoc and surprise during the town's annual Christmas performance, leaving no one prepared for the mayhem.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Greece
programme.desc: When childhood friends Magalie and Blandine cross paths after many years, they decide to finally take their dream vacation to Greece.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: And Mrs
programme.desc: When a reluctant bride-to-be's fiance drops dead, she insists on marrying him anyway, vowing to overcome public opinion, the law of the land, and her loved one's objections.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A young land clerk is summoned to a vampire's castle, while his wife falls under the spell of a dark force in her dreams, leading to a perilous journey into the unknown.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: The crypto-zoological agency Monarch faces off against the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis: the three-headed King Ghidorah.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: An apocalyptic zombie uprising gives Shaun and his mates a night from hell when they meet at the local pub and find themselves fighting off hordes of the brain-hungry undead in this horror comedy.

programme.title: Land of the Lost
programme.desc: A has-been scientist with no weapons, no skills and no idea at all, lands in an alternative universe of marauding dinosaurs and fantastic creatures.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: A crashlanding puts a father and son on a dangerous planet - Earth. Hunted by an alien and by evolved animal species, the pair must work together to survive.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A group of European mercenaries become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China in this epic adventure.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: FBI agent Flynn has to transport a witness, but as the plane reaches 30,000 feet, hundreds of deadly snakes are released, causing violent mayhem.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Deep-sea rescue diver Jonas must confront his fears to save a crew trapped on the ocean floor in a submersible that's been attacked by a massive creature.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened, bringing terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When evil Gargamel kidnaps Smurfette, the Smurfs and their human friends led by Patrick unite to help her escape the clutches of the Naughties.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is back and is coping with some major life changes. This chapter explores the emotional lives of our pets: the deep bond between them and the families that love them.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: J and K return as the secretive agents who 'out' aliens. When a dangerous one lands, disguised as an irresistible model, they have to save humanity once again.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: In this sly satire, a group of elites gather to hunt ordinary Americans for sport. But one of The Hunted fights back against The Hunters' leader.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: King Kong (2005)
programme.desc: The leading lady in a movie is abducted as a sacrifice for a giant ape in this jaw-dropping, triple Oscar-winning remake of the 1933 classic.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor 'Sully' Sullivan to recover a fortune amassed by Ferdinand Magellan, and lost 500 years ago.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his father's death, Black Manta uses the Black Trident's power to become a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Aquaman must forge an alliance with his imprisoned brother.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the police academy will be open to any and all applicants.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer has gone 40 years without a woman and his pals are out to break his luck. Can he survive their hilariously bad advice? Will he find love and get laid?

programme.title: Dolittle
programme.desc: The eccentric Dr Dolittle sets sail on an epic adventure to a mythical island, regaining his wit and courage as he crosses old adversaries and discovers wondrous creatures.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Africa's the place, and Ace is on the case of the missing rare white bat, returning as the alligator-wrestlin', elephant-callin', all-round amazing pet detective.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, Sonny Koufax is a carefree slob trying to save his love life by becoming responsible. He gets the chance when a cute kid turns up needing a father.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
programme.desc: The passion has gone for a Manhattan couple, until they witness a murder and the FBI ships them off to Wyoming. Maybe the slow pace of the Rockies can fan the flame.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk becomes a manic superhero when he stumbles upon a mysterious ancient mask.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours 2
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly decide to sell and move to the suburbs. But when a sorority moves in and threatens the sale, they must team up with their former enemy Teddy, to bring the girls down.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: Lloyd and Harry. One's dumb, the other's dumber. Two dunderheads stumble across a briefcase full of ransom money for kidnappers linked to the Mob.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: This is a sinfully satisfying revenge romp that follows three women who are reunited by the death of a college friend, teaming up they embark on a mission to teach their cheating ex-husbands a lesson.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley takes a chance on adventure when she is invited on a vacation to Greece. She's back to her rebellious roots, saying yes to a wild fling with a rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Draws on both the classic novel and the writings of Louisa May Alcott, and unfolds as the author's alter ego.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when a feisty producer attempts to revive a struggling news program with feuding co-hosts.

programme.title: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A divorced newspaper researcher finds a love letter in a bottle washed up on a beach and tracks it to a grieving widower.

programme.title: Monster-In-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte finally finds the man of her dreams only to discover that his mother is the woman of her nightmares.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Focuses on the intensely dramatic and high-stakes responsibilities and decisions that Golda Meir, also known as the Iron Lady of Israel, faces during the Yom Kippur War.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: An 11-year-old miner's son is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: Up In Smoke

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: Marshal Gerard leads the hunt by initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. This film is packed with suspense, action and daring twists.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: Dead Calm
programme.desc: A couple rescues a half-delirious sole survivor of a crippled schooner, but soon the stranger will plunge the unwary pair into an intense battle of cat and mouse. And life or death.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Max drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other defenders of a fuel depot are the bizarre warriors commanded by the Humungus.

programme.title: Dead Calm
programme.desc: A couple rescues a half-delirious sole survivor of a crippled schooner, but soon the stranger will plunge the unwary pair into an intense battle of cat and mouse. And life or death.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: A widowed man and his three children fall for an Italian woman who joins their floating home as housekeeper. He wins both their love and hers too.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: Based on a remarkable true story, a mother's faith stands against all odds and inspires her husband and children to hold on to theirs.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries
programme.desc: Billie Blessings has gone from beloved chef, restaurant owner and morning show segment host to the prime suspect in a murder case when one of the executives at the network dies from poisoning.

programme.title: Poisoned Love: The Stacey Castor Story
programme.desc: Stacey Castor weathered the storm of her first husband's death and managed to find love again with her boss, David. But when David is discovered dead of an apparent suicide, the police suspect foul play.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance becomes the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie does everything she can to save her business. When her first love unexpectedly returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: Far from Heaven
programme.desc: Suburban America in the 1950s: a place where autumn leaves fall on cue, until scandal comes calling for a perfect wife.

programme.title: Stepmom

programme.desc: After meeting only in their dreams, a man and a woman have seven days to turn their romantic visions into reality.

programme.desc: Cookbook author Billie Blessings is excited when friend Katie Sanders appears as a guest host on her show, but being a TV star can't save Katie from falling under suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Wedding Wars

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, this is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: This story follows Maurice, a streetwise cat, who has the perfect money-making scam. He finds a dumb-looking kid who plays a pipe and has his very own horde of rats.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: From the producers of Shaun of the Dead and Hot Fuzz, Attack the Block follows a gang of tough inner-city kids who try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: In the heart of terror in 1940, two German people resist everyday life and have an extraordinary impact.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s intent on keeping up their hedonistic lifestyle. That is, until Laura falls in love with Jim and begins to question all of her choices.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: UK. A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver to show him the ropes. But a stunning woman upsets the applecart after a hit in this witty caper.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.desc: Jam packed full of outrageous anecdotes, lessons in maverick filmmaking, a smattering of international names and a genuine, infectious love of Aussie movies.

programme.title: Tim

programme.desc: A new assistant's incompetence has the Dunder Mifflin staff up in arms, but Michael refuses to fire him, as he's his nephew. Andy tries to ignore Erin's dating of Gabe.

programme.title: Travis: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On April 10, 2012, life for the Mills family dramatically changed forever. A routine patrol in Afghanistan turned into the fight of SSG Travis Mills's life when he was hit by an IED and lost portions of both arms and legs.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real and relatable. Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 1
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Three Prayers of Forgiveness, Pastor Bayless unpacks the prayer of Paul from 2 Timothy: "May it not be counted against them."

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: It's my great joy to introduce to you my amazing daughter Emily Ruonala as she shares an amazing message around Psalms.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 2
programme.desc: Find out how to reignite your passion and transform your life as Joyce shares powerful insights on the importance of stirring yourself up, as well as those around you.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Before You Step Out of the Will of God/The Troublemaker Within Us
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues,Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Love & Glamping
programme.desc: City girl Katie is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort. Far from sporty, she faces her fears trying the camp's activities with help from Will, a rugged outdoorsman and nature guide.

programme.title: The Journey - 20 years of Red Frogs
programme.desc: Armed with over 10 tonne of Allen's lollies, Red Frogs volunteers assist school-leavers by walking them home, cooking pancakes and offering emotional support. 20 years since that first schoolies week, we look at the Red Frogs journey.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: What's Your Everest?
programme.desc: An inspiring expedition documentary following Bjorn Brickell of Life FM, Sue Van Schreven of Orphans Aid International and a team of supporters, as they climb to one of the worlds most renowned trekking destinations.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Khirbet Qeiyafa - Witness to David's Kingdom
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: King Herod _ A Legacy of Blood and Stone
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Why You Can Have Bold Faith Even When You Have Failed Pt 2
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A group of California Christians present the claims of Christ to unbelievers at Huntington Beach.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 2
programme.desc: Find out how to reignite your passion and transform your life as Joyce shares powerful insights on the importance of stirring yourself up, as well as those around you.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic misses all of the signs of true love when she puts her trust in a bouquet tossed at a wedding.

programme.title: Norm Geisler: Not Qualified
programme.desc: An illiterate farm boy asks why Christianity is true, and no one seems to have the answers. His journey to finding those answers leads him to become a worldwide leader who affects the Christian faith in a mighty way.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter and teamup with Mad Max.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: Spin the Bottle
programme.desc: A group of friends plays spin the bottle in a house marked by a massacre, unleashing an evil spirit. As they die in terrifying ways, the survivors must uncover the house's dark secrets.

programme.title: Get Away
programme.desc: A remote getaway takes an unexpected turn when a family discover the island that they're on is inhabited by a serial killer.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: As global pop star Skye Riley preps for a world tour, she faces terrifying events and the pressures of fame, pushing her to confront her haunting past.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened, bringing terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: An apocalyptic zombie uprising gives Shaun and his mates a night from hell when they meet at the local pub and find themselves fighting off hordes of the brain-hungry undead in this horror comedy.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Doom
programme.desc: A frantic call for help from a remote research station on Mars sends a team of mercenary Marines into action.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious virus turns people into mindless, flesh-eating zombies, a handful of survivors wage a desperate, last-stand battle to stay alive - and human.

programme.title: Land of the Dead
programme.desc: Packed with more heart-pounding and blood-curdling thrills than any theatre could show, this special unleashes the ultimate vision of George A Romero's latest living-dead shock-fest.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six strangers unwittingly find themselves locked in a maze of deadly rooms. Joining forces with two of the original survivors, they soon discover they've all played the game before.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain and the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta: they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the universe.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The re-resurrected mummy of an Egyptian high priest kidnaps the son of archaeologists who first dug him up, and sets out to destroy mankind by commanding the army of the ancient Scorpion King.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2019)
programme.desc: In this next generation, the world's most highly trained women all over the globe are now teams of Angels guided by multiple Bosleys taking on the toughest jobs everywhere.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2019)
programme.desc: When a mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels set out to bring down the bad guys. When a terrible secret is revealed, it makes the Angels targets.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: Agents who monitor aliens must foil an intergalactic plot to prevent two worlds from colliding. It's just another typical day for the Men in Black crack team.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: For the love of a beautiful woman a city will burn to the ground. An epic tale of honour, war, forbidden passion and the towering Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
programme.desc: The passion has gone for a Manhattan couple, until they witness a murder and the FBI ships them off to Wyoming. Maybe the slow pace of the Rockies can fan the flame.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours
programme.desc: A rivalry between members of a fraternity house and their quiet neighbours escalates into all-out war.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours 2
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly decide to sell and move to the suburbs. But when a sorority moves in and threatens the sale, they must team up with their former enemy Teddy, to bring the girls down.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: Lloyd and Harry. One's dumb, the other's dumber. Two dunderheads stumble across a briefcase full of ransom money for kidnappers linked to the Mob.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane brings his brazen humour to the screen when a grown man must deal with the loved teddy bear that came to life from a childhood wish and has refused to leave since.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: Drillbit Taylor
programme.desc: From the hilarious team that bring you Superbad, three students who are bullied by a guy channelling Hannibal Lecter, hire the cheapest mercenary they can find to fight the forces of evil.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: A couple who lose their minds whilst trying to hold onto the elusive American dream, turn to crime to get back in the black and outwit a greedy, corporate executive.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: First Assignment
programme.desc: The team of bungling recruits have finally graduated and are let loose on an unsuspecting public as they take on their first cases.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up, but there's a glitch: she's financing her shopping with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and their mates travel to Thailand for Stu's subdued pre-wedding brunch after the unforgettable bachelor party in Vegas. However, things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane brings his brazen humour to the screen when a grown man must deal with the loved teddy bear that came to life from a childhood wish and has refused to leave since.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when a feisty producer attempts to revive a struggling news program with feuding co-hosts.

programme.title: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A divorced newspaper researcher finds a love letter in a bottle washed up on a beach and tracks it to a grieving widower.

programme.title: Monster-In-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte finally finds the man of her dreams only to discover that his mother is the woman of her nightmares.

programme.title: Far from Heaven
programme.desc: Suburban America in the 1950s: a place where autumn leaves fall on cue, until scandal comes calling for a perfect wife.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Heartbroken after the end of a relationship, a man falls for a new, advanced operating system - a bright, female voice, who is insightful and surprisingly funny.

programme.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Two best friends agree to an unconventional marriage built on intellectual passion instead of sexual heat. But when then fall in love, they realise they are courting chaos.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: Jane Eyre
programme.desc: Based on Charlotte Bronte's classic novel, this adaptation tells the story of Jane Eyre, a former orphan who now works as a governess for the wealthy and moody landowner, Mr Rochester.

programme.title: Far from Heaven
programme.desc: Suburban America in the 1950s: a place where autumn leaves fall on cue, until scandal comes calling for a perfect wife.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Focuses on the intensely dramatic and high-stakes responsibilities and decisions that Golda Meir, also known as the Iron Lady of Israel, faces during the Yom Kippur War.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: An 11-year-old miner's son is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law Of Return
programme.desc: A squad of elite soldiers, risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met, when he's shot down flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrates the life of an icon who inspires generations. In this uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that change the world.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: The incredible true story that follows an Alaskan State Trooper as he sets out to end the murderous rampage of a serial killer who has gone unnoticed for 13 years.

programme.title: The Last Rifleman
programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: This timely true story of kindness triumphing over cynicism is based on the real-life friendship between beloved TV host Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrates the life of an icon who inspires generations. In this uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that change the world.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: A widowed man and his three children fall for an Italian woman who joins their floating home as housekeeper. He wins both their love and hers too.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: An unforgettable and hilarious portrait of life's most rewarding occupation: Parenthood. The Buckmans are a modern-day family facing the age-old dilemma of trying to raise children the right way.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturised in a secret experiment, and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Green Mile
programme.desc: A gentle giant of a prisoner with supernatural powers brings a sense of spirit and humanity to the guards and inmates on death row.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Green Mile
programme.desc: A gentle giant of a prisoner with supernatural powers brings a sense of spirit and humanity to the guards and inmates on death row.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: More Sex & the Single Mom
programme.desc: A woman's (Gail O'Grady) life turns chaotic when her ex-lover (Grant Show) returns and her daughter (Chelsea Hobbs) becomes infatuated with an older man.

programme.title: The Hunt for the BTK Killer
programme.desc: For 31 years, the serial killer known as BTK raised terror in the small town of Wichita, Kansas. This is the story of how police found, captured, and convicted the vicious killer named Dennis Rader.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A corporate lawyer finds love in the most unexpected place when she agrees to go on a blind date with a sexy and free-spirited landscaper.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Shocking secrets are revealed when a mother is found stabbed to death and her daughter goes missing.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: After meeting only in their dreams, a man and a woman have seven days to turn their romantic visions into reality.

programme.title: No Escape Room
programme.desc: A father and daughter check out a small town's escape room and discover something sinister about the place.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: An uptight English writer's book is a failure but a hit in Mexico. When he's invited there to promote it, he discovers his Spanish translator has rewritten his book as an erotic novel.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: After graduating from high school without any plans for the future, Isaiah receives a push to start making better life decisions.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: Love Letters
programme.desc: A man (Steven Weber) and a woman (Laura Linney) maintain a relationship through correspondence begun in childhood.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell in this must-watch daily program to get an edge on equities, earnings and the economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bullish
programme.desc: With investing tools at everyone's fingertips, is it a chance for generational wealth or a siren call for suckers?

programme.title: Bullish
programme.sub-title: Meet the Women of Wall Street
programme.desc: Finance is an industry dominated by men, but women are rising and controlling more wealth globally. How did the women of Wall Street break through, and what's changing now that they have?

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Links the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to guests with skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, and Kriti Gupta.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: This program covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping decentralised finance. Your weekly source for the latest news, analysis and interviews with the most influential stakeholders.

programme.title: On the Wings

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: Mito Kosei, 78, was exposed to radiation in the womb when an atomic bomb exploded over Hiroshima. For 20 years or so, he's been a volunteer guide, telling foreign visitors the truth about the bombing.

programme.title: The Masterpieces of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This miniseries presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period. This episode features ukiyo-e artist Sharaku's "The Actor Ichikawa Ebizo as Takemura Sadanoshin."

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: My Street Piano

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to the color red. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Actor Fujiwara Momona has been a wheelchair user since childhood. In a society that tends to limit how people with disabilities live their lives, what world does this budding actor hope to build?

programme.title: We Own This City

programme.title: We Own This City

programme.title: We Own This City
