programme.desc: A man fails a lie detector test and confesses to brutally murdering his pregnant wife Shan'ann and their two young daughters.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Marriage Made for Murder
programme.desc: Hailey's professional code of ethics prevents her from going to the police about a client's confession, so she must find another way to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: After graduating from high school without any plans for the future, Isaiah receives a push to start making better life decisions.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: During the invasion by the Western Allied forces in Normandy, the Supreme Allied Commander executes the biggest military manoeuvre in the face of internal conflicts and tribulations.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Six unruly kids wreak havoc and surprise during the town's annual Christmas performance, leaving no one prepared for the mayhem.

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 2
programme.desc: Continues with the story of self-diagnosed nymphomaniac Joe exploring her adulthood, during which her journey of self-discovery leads to darker complications.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance becomes the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case.

programme.desc: The key to achieving peace is feeling the pain of others. It's an idea Hayashida Mitsuhiro picked up from hibakusha in his native Nagasaki, and one he tries to teach young visitors to his city.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: On a deadly mission behind enemy lines a wily WWII sergeant, his loyal Sherman tank crew and a rookie soldier find themselves hopelessly outnumbered.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: As a police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop, the biggest diamond heist ever committed is in motion.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is happy fading into the background. But when his co-worker Benson goes on a sudden violent rampage, Randy is forced to face his fears and confront his troubled past in order to survive.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Karen Blixen establishes a plantation in wild and untamed Africa, which is now being threatened by an ensuing war between rival native tribes.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes
programme.desc: A classic comedy based around a group of WWII soldiers who plan to steal a treasure trove from the Nazis.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: Samantha's 16th birthday should be perfect and memorable. But her whole family is preoccupied with her sister's wedding and completely forgets Samantha's big day.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance becomes the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: Life Without Dick
programme.desc: After Colleen accidentally kills her boyfriend Dick, mafia hit-man Daniel offers to take credit for the murder.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian (Camryn Manheim) with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout (Scott Cohen).

programme.title: Left to Die
programme.desc: An innocent woman is thrown into an Ecuadorian jail for drug trafficking. Her only hope is her daughter Tammi's belief in her mother's innocence and her fight to free her.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born one minute apart, leading very different lives. Years later, they reconnect and wonder if it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: Love Letters
programme.desc: A man (Steven Weber) and a woman (Laura Linney) maintain a relationship through correspondence begun in childhood.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Poisoned Love: The Stacey Castor Story
programme.desc: Stacey Castor weathered the storm of her first husband's death and managed to find love again with her boss, David. But when David is discovered dead of an apparent suicide, the police suspect foul play.
